meaning: n.泥铲,移植泥刀vt.用泥铲铲,用泥铲涂
examples: On the grass near the tree, Mary had dropped her trowel.
He was laying the flattery on with a trowel.
Obama certainly did instantly seek maximum political advantage and rather laid it on with a trowel.
It suggests carrying a small trowel to make the task of digging a hole to bury waste easier.
